concerts.name: Soduru Sihinayaki Raa - සොඳුරු සිහිනයකි රෑ
concerts.description:
✨ සොඳුරු සිහිනයකි රෑ ✨


වේයන්ගොඩ බණ්ඩාරනායක මධ්‍ය විද්‍යාලීය ආදි ශිෂ්‍ය සංගමය සංවිධානය කරන සිත නිවන සංගීතමය සැඳෑව! 🎶

රවීන් කනිෂ්ක, පියුමි පතිරජ, ඉනෝකා අහංගම සමඟින් මහේෂ් නිශ්ශංක සහ මහින්ද ප්‍රසාද් මස්ඉඹුල එකතු වන සුවිශේෂී ප්‍රසංගය.


🎯 අරමුණ: පාසලේ යෝජිත පිහිනුම් තටාකය ඇතුළු ක්‍රීඩා සංකීර්ණය ඉදිකිරීම සඳහා අරමුදල් රැස්කිරීම.

They locked the gates.
But they can’t lock the vibe.

Escape the pressure | Break the routine.
Serve your sentence on the dancefloor. 🔥
This July …
Kandy goes under lockdown. 🔐🎶

concerts.name: A LOVE SONG ACROSS THE SEAS
concerts.description:
A Love Song Across SeasFrom Berlin to Sri Lanka, a midsummer conjuring: the Chamber Music Society of Colombo announcestwo vocal recitals this July, in Colombo and Jaffna, that feel less like performances than acts of return. Theprincipal figures are themselves the product of small, porous worlds: the Sri Lankan‑German tenor ThaisenRusch and the German‑Estonian mezzo‑soprano Ireene Ollino, both members of the esteemed chorus at theDeutsche Oper Berlin. They arrive not as imported curiosities but as colleagues of a profession whose linesof travel and longing now thread Europe and the Indian Ocean.Rusch, whose recent recording of Schubert’s Winterreise testifies to a lyricism that favors inwardness overshow, has held stage with the Munich Philharmonic and the Berlin Radio Choir and serves asartist‑in‑residence with the Sinfonisches Kammerorchester Berlin.Ollino, a laureate of the Triomphe de l’Art competition, brings the polish of engagements under Sir SimonRattle and Thomas Guggeis at the Staatsoper Unter den Linden. Both singers carry that peculiarcombination of European conservatory discipline and the lived, improvisatory grace that travel and hybrididentity foster.

They will be supported by principal players of the Chamber Music Society of Colombo, led by ArtisticDirector Lakshman Joseph‑de Saram, along with pianist Johann Peiris. The program resists tidyperiodization: Händel’s baroque clarity is set against Mahler’s late‑Romantic whisper in “Urlicht,” whilearias by Bizet, Mozart and Verdi remind listeners that theater and confession are two sides of the samecoin. The evening’s logic is not historical survey but intimacy - an economy of means that exposes whatthe music is made to do: witness, confess, persuade.

“This concert hopes to strip these pieces back to their bones so the music and the singer can speak plainly,”Joseph‑de Saram said. “In an intimate setting, you hear every breath and every shift in color. Ireene andThaisen bring a rare depth and honesty to the stage; they don’t just sing the notes, they tell the story. Wewant listeners to encounter these works anew - not as two‑dimensional museum pieces, but as living,breathing music.”

Founded in 2007, the CMSC has spent nearly two decades cultivating programming that is at once rigorousand rooted, pairing high‑concept projects with an active education arm. The society’s international advisoryboard - whose names include the virtuoso Midori and Leslie Suganandarajah, music director of theSalzburg Landestheater - signals a global conversation; its Education Fund, which circulates thousands offree tickets to students from marginalized communities, insists on a local accountability. The result is akind of cultural diplomacy: music as exchange, and as a small, stubborn insistence that art should openrather than sequester.

Performance & Ticket InformationThe series opens in Colombo at the Lionel Wendt Theatre on Thursday, July 25 at 7:00 PM, supported bythe Rukmini Tissanayagam Trust, A. Baur & Co., and the Goethe‑Institut as venue partner. The ensemblewill then travel north for a historic performance in Jaffna at Kälam on Sunday, July 28 at 6:30 PM. TheJaffna concert is funded through the generosity of the Samuel Gnanam IT Center, with the Goethe‑Institutcontinuing as venue partner.

Seating is strictly reserved for both venues.These midsummer concerts, arriving at a moment when travel and belonging have become complicatedcurrencies, feel like a parable of belonging itself - of artists who move through the world and bring back, intheir breath and timbre, the places they have been. For audiences in Colombo and Jaffna, the performancespromise the unusual intimacy of hearing familiar scores reanimated by voices that have learned, elsewhere,to listen.

concerts.name: API NODANNA LIVE ON STAGE
concerts.description:
Get Ready for a Night of Laughter and Legends!
Join us on 8th August at Kularathne Auditorium, Ananda College for Api Nodanna Live Onstage — a side-splitting stand-up comedy show featuring the legendary duo Chuti Malli and Podi Malli.
The pioneers of Sri Lankan comedy are back, bringing you an unforgettable night filled with sharp wit, hilarious stories, and nonstop laughter.
One stage. Two icons. A thousand laughs. Don’t miss it!
Organized by the Ananda College 125th Anniversary Celebration Group.

concerts.name: SOUNDSCAPE
concerts.description: {"blocks":[{"key":"55ag","text":"SOUNDSCAPE with 2FORTY2 is a premium live music experience that blends world-class entertainment, immersive production, and an elegant atmosphere into one unforgettable night. More than just a concert, SOUNDSCAPE is designed to create a journey where every beat, every performance, and every moment connects the audience through the power of music.","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":348,"style":"fontsize-14"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"198j0","text":"","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1plmb","text":"Set within the luxurious Indoor Air-Conditioned Marquee at Taj Samudra Colombo, this exclusive event brings together music lovers, friends, and trendsetters for a night filled with energy, excitement, and lasting memories. From captivating live performances to a vibrant crowd atmosphere, SOUNDSCAPE is where music becomes an experience rather than just a performance.","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":368,"style":"fontsize-14"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6c8hh","text":"","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"blj7e","text":"Step into a world of rhythm, emotion, and celebration. Feel the energy, embrace the moment, and become part of a night that will be remembered long after the music fades.","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":170,"style":"fontsize-14"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a6eq9","text":"","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qed5","text":"SOUNDSCAPE with 2FORTY2 — Where Music Meets Experience.","type":"header-six","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":55,"style":"fontsize-14"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

concerts.name: YAATHRA
concerts.description: Yaathra brings together artists from two generations on one stage, for an unforgettable evening of music set against the picturesque backdrop of Waters Edge. This carefully curated concert celebrates the soul of Sri Lankan cinema music alongside a vibrant selection of other much-loved songs.Spanning generations and styles, Baachi Susan, Amal Perera, Nirosha Virajini, Nuwandhika Senarathne, Ridma Weerawardena, and Yasas Medagedara come together on one stage, each bringing their own distinctive artistry to timeless classics and beloved favourites.From the golden era of Sri Lankan film music to contemporary hits, Yaathra promises an evening woven with emotion, nostalgia, and celebration, a true musical pilgrimage for music lovers of all generations.

concerts.name: Ahasin Eha - අහසින් එහා
concerts.description:
Ahasin Eha - අහසින් එහා 


🎼 Ahasin Eha (අහසින් එහා) – මියැසි අවකාශය

✨ Ahasin Eha is a grand musical evening celebrating the timeless lyrical masterpieces of Sri Lanka's renowned and beloved composer, Nilar N. Kasim. Organized by the Alumni Association of the University of Sri Jayewardenepura, this spectacular concert promises an unforgettable night where poetry meets melody, taking you on an emotional journey through the skies of Sri Lankan music.


🎙️ The evening features an incredible lineup of Sri Lanka’s most celebrated voices bringing these beautiful compositions to life by BNS (Bathiya and Santhush) , Umaria Sinhavansha , Uresha Kavihari , Ruwan Hettiarachchi , Raween Kanishka , Thanura Madugeeth , Ashka Kulatunga 


🎭 From soulful classics to modern hits, experience a premium live performance where every lyric tells a story and every melody touches the heart.


🌟 Join us for a magical night where passion meets performance, talent meets artistry, and Sri Lankan music takes center stage.


Event Details

📍 Venue: Nelum Pokuna Theatre (නෙළුම් පොකුණ රංගහල)

📅 Date: 22nd August 2026 (2026 අගෝස්තු 22)

⏰ Time: 6.30 PM (සවස 6.30 ට)


🎶 Experience the magic of a grand musical production unlike any other and be part of an unforgettable night of music, emotion, and artistry.

concerts.name: Karaoke Show Live With DKM
concerts.description:
Karaoke Show Live With DKM


After months of unforgettable karaoke nights and viral moments across Southern Sri Lanka, DKM is finally bringing the experience to Colombo!


Join one of Sri Lanka's fastest-growing R&B, Hip Hop, and Pop performers for a night filled with music, energy, and unforgettable memories. This isn't just a concert—it's a chance for fans to sing along, take the spotlight, and be part of the show.

Expect live performances of your favorite hits, crowd sing-alongs, special guest appearances, and the unique karaoke atmosphere that has made DKM a social media sensation.


Whether you've been following the viral videos online or you've experienced the magic in person, this is your chance to be part of the biggest DKM karaoke night yet.


﻿Location - Taphouse by RnR Colombo

Date - August 22nd
concerts.venue: Taphouse by RnR Colombo - Dutch Hospital Complex

concerts.name: DOPERMEAN
concerts.description:
DOPERMEAN Season 1 is a one-night music experience on the shores of Arugambay, Sri Lanka—bringing together the energy of the 80s, the anthems of the 90s, and the pulse of house music in a breathtaking tropical setting.

Family-friendly, inclusive, and built on good vibes, this event is more than just a party. A portion of every ticket supports elephant-human conflict awareness and conservation in the region.

Seamless entry via Tickets Ministry. All ages welcome. Good people. Great music. A cause that matters.

📅 July 28th | 📍 Arugambay, Sri Lanka

concerts.name: PULZE X
concerts.description:
PULZE-X is a futuristic, story-driven live concert experience presented by STAGELAB Events.Step into the world of Project X, a mysterious lifeform created inside the STAGELAB research facility. As music, technology and crowd energy collide, Project X begins to awaken—transforming the venue into an immersive cyberpunk universe filled with powerful live performances, cinematic visuals, lighting effects and synchronized X-Band LED wristbands.

This is more than a concert. It is a live sci-fi experience where every attendee becomes part of the experiment.

concerts.name: Yugatra යුගාත්‍රා - Live in concert  2026
concerts.description:
යුගාත්‍රා - Live in concert 


සංගීතයෙන් යුග යුග යා කරන “යුගාත්‍රා” ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ අංක 1 ප්‍රාසංගික නාලිකාව, TV දෙරණෙන් විකාශය වන සම්මානනීය සහ අතිශය ජනප්‍රිය සංගීත වැඩසටහනකි. එහි සජීව අත්දැකීමක් ලෙස සහෘද ප්‍රේක්ෂක ඔබ වෙත සමීප කරන “යුගාත්‍රා - Live in Concert” මනුසත් දෙරණට සවිබල පිණිස පැවැත්වේ.


ජනප්‍රිය ප්‍රවීණයින් සමග නව පරපුරේ විශිෂ්ටයින් එකම වේදිකාවක තම තමන්ගේ ගීත එක්ව ගායනා කිරීම මෙම ප්‍රසංගයේ ඇති සුවිශේෂීත්වයයි.


මෙම අති උත්කර්ෂවත් ප්‍රසංගය ජනප්‍රිය 'Shiksha' සංගීත කණ්ඩායම විසින් සංගීතවත් කරනු ලබන අතර, නිවේදන කටයුතු මෙහෙයවනු ලබන්නේ මනුරංග විජේසේකර විසිනි.

concerts.name: Ridee Gee - රීදී ගී
concerts.description:
Ridee Gee - රීදී ගී


රිදී ගී -2 "ආදරේ හිතෙනවා දැක්කම"


ආචාර්‍ය රෝහණ වීරසිංහ මහතා ගේ සංගීත අඩ්‍යක්ශනයෙන් , සමන් අතාවුදහෙට්ටි මහතාගේ කතනයෙන් සහ උරේශා රවිහාරි , සුරේන්ද්‍ර පෙරේරා , සුනෙත් උදයරත්න , තනුර මදුගීත් , උමාලි තිලකරත්න , නෙරංජා දේවි , ලිහිනි මිනෝදා, සමීර ලලිතාංග යන ප්‍රකටගායන ශිල්පීන් පිරිසක් සමඟ එක්ව, ශ්‍රී ලංකා සිනමාවේ රන් යුගය සමරන අමතක නොවන සංගීත සන්ධ්‍යාවකට ඔබට ආරාධනා කරමු.


මෙම ප්‍රසංගයේ ,ආචාර්‍ය් අමරදේව, ජෝතිපාල, වික්ටර් රත්නායක, විජය කුමාරතුංග , මිල්ටන් මල්ලවාරච්චි, ඇන්ජලීන් ගුණතිලක, ලතා වල්පොල, නන්දා මාලනී සහ සුජාතා ආත්තනායක ගායනා කල සුප්‍රසිද්ධ ගීත රාශියක් ඉදිරිපත් කෙරේ.  

මෙම ගීත මාලිනී ෆොන්සේකා, ගාමිණී ෆොන්සේකා, විජය කුමාරණතුංග සහ තවත් ශ්‍රී ලාංකික කලාකරුවන් රඟපෑ සුප්‍රසිද්ධ චිත්‍රපට වලින් තෝරාගෙන ඇත.


සැප්තැම්බර් 12 වන දින BMICH හීදී.

ප්‍රවේශ පත්‍ර-mytickets.lk වෙබ් අඩවියෙන් ලබා ගත හැක  

(රු. 15,000, 10,000, 7,500, 6000, 5,000, 3,000, 2,000)


මෙම අවස්ථාව කිසිසේත් මග හැර නොගන්න! ඔබට සිතට දිගු කලක් රැඳෙන අත්දැකීමක් ලබා දෙනු ඇත.

concerts.name: SUN DRIFT SESSIONS
concerts.description: The Sun Drift Session is positioned as a premium beachfront music experience bringing together international artists, respected Sri Lankan talent, lifestyle audiences, travelers, and party-goers at Avani Kalutara Resort. The event is designed to transition from a sunset coastal atmosphere into an elevated late night music experience, combining music, hospitality, brand activations, and destination entertainment.

concerts.name: AGNI RAP CONCERT
concerts.description: Hip hop rap music concert

concerts.name: WAREN HEEN SARE
concerts.description: "WAREN HEEN SARE" is a live musical concert celebrating the timeless creations of legendary Sri Lankan musician, The Father of Modern Sinhala Music Gurudevi Sunil Santha. Featuring talented vocalists, the event offers an unforgettable evening of nostalgia, culture, and beautiful music, bringing Sri Lanka's musical heritage to life for a new generation.

concerts.name: RAJINATA ANDA LIVE ON STAGE
concerts.description: Musical Concert: Rajinata Anda - Live on Stage

concerts.name: SWARAABHISHEKA
concerts.description:
Swarabhisheka 🎼
Step into an unforgettable evening where the golden voices of Sri Lanka come together on one stage. Swarabhisheka celebrates the rich heritage of classical music with performances by legendary maestros: Sunil Edirisinghe | Amarasiri Peiris | Kasun Kalhara | Suneera Sumanga.
Join us for a soul-stirring journey through melody, memory, and mastery — a night that pays homage to the enduring power of song.
Music Direction: Sugath Hettiarachchi
Compered by: Bandula Nanayakkarawasam

concerts.name: Thaala Samaggraha - තාල සමග්‍රහ
concerts.description:
Thaala Samaggraha - තාල සමග්‍රහ 


Thala Samagraha is a grand musical journey that celebrates the evolution of Sri Lankan music through time. More than a concert , it is an immersive experience that takes audiences on a chronological voyage across the difining eras that shaped the nation’s musical identity…


Date - 19th September 2026

Time -7.00 pm

Venue - Viharamadevi Park

Gates Open - 5.30 pm

concerts.name: ATHITHAWALOKA
concerts.description: Athithawaloka is a premium, nostalgia-driven cultural concert at Musaeus College Auditorium celebrating the "Golden Era" of Sri Lankan classical music. Led by legends Visharada Amarasiri Peiris, Sunil Edirisinghe, and T.M. Jayarathne, this exclusive evening seamlessly bridges generations through timeless melodies and cinematic storytelling.

concerts.name: නේත්‍රා(Nethraa) Live in Concert chapter 2
concerts.description: නේත්‍රා(Nethraa) Live in Concert chapter 2 happening at TBA. Date & Time: Tue, Sep 29, 2026, 07:30 AM. Tickets start from 3000 LKR.

concerts.name: SPICE ISLAND SESSIONS
concerts.description: Following the energy of our first edition, Spice Island Session Vol. 2 returns with a deeper commitment to building and uplifting the local rave culture. This private gathering is dedicated to celebrating authentic house music, bringing together music lovers, DJs, and creatives in a safe, inclusive space where rhythm, connection, and self-expression take center stage. More than just a party, Spice Island Session is a movement to nurture a thriving underground house music community—one session at a time.

concerts.name: ERA OF MARIANS
concerts.description: Era Of Marians is a premier outdoor musical event happening on October 03rd, 2026 at Waters Edge, featuring the legendary Marians led by Nalin Perera, alongside powerhouse performers Rookantha Goonatillake, Kasun Kalhara, Chamara Weerasinghe, Jayasri. Organized by YO Entertainment, this one-night-only experience promises a vibrant celebration of Sri Lankan music, culture, and unforgettable live performances in a stunning open-air setting.
